title: Will Donald J. Trump attend The 2026 FIFA World Cup Final?

adversarial_concerns: Divergence from market (6%) may reflect unmodeled tail risks (e.g., political/crisis events) not adequately addressed in reasoning
Precedent cited (2025 Club World Cup) is a single data point with potentially different stakes/logistics
Assumes ceremonial role guarantees attendance without accounting for potential changes in Trump's public schedule or health
current.rationale_summary: Sitting president with a publicly confirmed ceremonial role (Infantino: Trump will help hand over the trophy), stated intent + schedule held, trivial NJ logistics, and direct precedent attending the 2025 Club World Cup final at the same venue; residual is acute crisis tail risk.
reference_classes: president attending pre-committed domestic ceremonial event ~95-98%

history.lean_note: I lean YES (my prob 85%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
history.rationale_summary: Trump plans to attend (WH 'holding' his schedule); FIFA wants him to present the trophy; precedent at Club World Cup; marquee US-hosted event he is motivated to attend. Residual scheduling/security/health risk a month out.
reference_classes: stated-intention attendance at marquee events ~1 month out
